h2.span: The world’s last true open road.

p.span: Desert, mountains, steppe, and lakes in one continuous expedition.
Цөл, уулс, тал хээр, нуур нэг expedition-д.

h3.span: Travellers who want the real thing

li.span: Custom-built expedition vehicle, not a rental
Түрээс биш, тусгай бүтээгдсэн expedition машин
Point-to-point routes — no road ever repeated
Цэгээс цэг — ижил зам хэзээ ч давтагддаггүй

p.span: One of the least crowded countries on earth, built for true distance.
Desert, mountains, steppe, and lake country in one route.
Цөл, уулс, тал хээр, нуур — нэг маршрутын системд.
Point-to-point travel where the route always moves forward.
Цэгээс цэг рүү. Маршрут үргэлж урагшилна.
Independent rhythm, backed by convoy teamwork and support.
Point-to-point routes. You never travel the same road twice.
Цэгээс цэг рүү. Ижил замыг давтдаггүй.

All expeditions are fully private,
custom-built around your group.

Бүх аялал бүрэн хувийн,
таны багт зориулагдсан.

div.p: Sand dunes, canyons, and red rock formations across Mongolia’s most iconic desert landscape.
Glaciers, extreme mountain terrain, and Kazakh culture deep in western Mongolia.
Ancient forests, crystal lakes, and total silence. Mongolia’s most serene premium nature experience.
Nomadic culture, historic sites, and sweeping steppe landscapes at the heart of Mongolia.
Limitless grasslands, zero infrastructure, and the most profound silence on earth.
From desert dunes to mountain glaciers — the ultimate variety across two of Mongolia’s greatest landscapes.
The wildest, most remote region. Kazakh eagle hunters, high passes, untouched wilderness.
Dense taiga forests, pristine rivers, and a cool northern climate unlike anywhere else in Mongolia.
Rolling grasslands meet mirror-still lakes. Open space and water tranquillity in perfect combination.

h2.span:
How Do You
Want to Feel?

p.span: It’s not where you go. It’s what you carry back.
Хаана явахаас биш, юу авч буцахыг боддог.

span.span: Drive without a road, sleep under a sky full of stars, stop wherever the land tells you to.
Days can pass without seeing another human being. A rare quiet, far beyond routine.
River crossings, steep climbs, sand, mud, snow, and terrain worth solving.
The Gobi at golden hour. The Altai at dawn. Khuvsgul in perfect stillness.

blockquote.p: “This is not a tour. This is a living, breathing expedition — built for those who want the real thing.”

h2.span:
Everything in place,
before you leave.

p.span: Drive, stop, rest, and explore at a pace that feels natural to your group.
Таны бүлэгт тохирсон хурдаар явах, зогсох, амрах.
In difficult terrain, river crossings, sand, and mud, the team moves together.
Хүнд газар, гол гатлах, элс, шавар — баг хамтдаа явна.
Expedition team support, first-aid readiness, travel insurance, and emergency planning.
Expedition багийн дэмжлэг, анхны тусламж, даатгал, онцгой байдлын төлөвлөгөө.
A self-contained base with heat, water, power, sleeping space, and recovery equipment.
Дулаан, ус, цахилгаан, унтах зай, нөхөн сэргээх тоног төхөөрөмжтэй бие даасан бааз.

h3.span:
Not a car. Not a camper.
Your home for the expedition.

Машин биш. Кемпер биш.
Аяллын таны гэр.

div.p: A fully autonomous, all-terrain vehicle built for Mongolia’s most extreme conditions. From the Gobi at 40°C to the Altai at −30°C — it handles everything.

img.alt: Mobile base camp in open landscape

p.span:
Every image is a real moment
from a real expedition.

div.p: Wide-open terrain, real expedition silence, and the scale that defines the journey.

button.data-gallery-text: Wide-open terrain, real expedition silence, and the scale that defines the journey.
Desert light, red earth, and routes shaped around the land rather than the road.
Remote passes, cold air, and a sharper edge of Mongolia's western wilderness.
Clear water, forested horizons, and a quieter rhythm between expedition days.
Flat horizons, soft light, and the kind of distance that makes time feel wider.
Forest roads, rivers, and colder air on the route toward Mongolia's green north.
Rougher tracks, high country, and the raw edge of remote travel.
Open grassland meeting water, built for slow mornings and long views.

p.span: Like what you see? Choose a route built around this kind of terrain.
Таалагдаж байна уу? Ийм нутагт тохирсон маршрутаа сонгоорой.
Small private groups. Real terrain. Travellers who came back with more than photos.
Жижиг хувийн баг. Жинхэнэ нутаг. Зурагнаас илүү дурсамж.

blockquote.p: We drove across the Gobi with zero tourist infrastructure — pure freedom. The kind of trip that changes your perspective on everything.
Mongolia is unlike anything else, and Minuru made it feel effortless and utterly real.
The attention to detail, the safety, the sheer scale of it. We’re already planning our return.

h2.span:
We Don’t Follow
Roads. We Make Them.

Бид зам дагадаггүй.
Бид шинэ зам нээдэг.

div.p: Minuru Motors was founded with a single conviction: Mongolia deserves to be experienced — not toured. Not managed, not packaged. Experienced, in the fullest sense of the word.
Our expeditions are built around capable vehicles, experienced guides, and the world’s last truly open frontier. We take small, private groups into terrain that most people will never see.
This is not adventure tourism. This is expedition travel, designed for those who understand the difference.
To set the global standard for premium expedition travel in Mongolia — combining freedom, safety, and authentic wilderness at the highest level.

blockquote.p: “Mongolia is not a destination. It is a confrontation with scale, silence, and your own limits. We built Minuru to give people that confrontation — properly.”

p.span: Tell us your group, timing, route interest, and travel expectations.
Таны баг, хугацаа, маршрут, аяллын хүлээлтийг хэлнэ үү.
We review fit, timing, driving comfort, and the right expedition level.
Тохирол, хугацаа, жолоодох тав тух, expedition түвшнийг хянана.
Your point-to-point itinerary shaped around terrain, season, and pace.
Цэгээс цэг маршрут нь нутаг, улирал, хурдаар тодорхойлогдоно.
Vehicles, guides, insurance, recovery gear, and camp systems prepared.
Машин, хөтөч, даатгал, аврах хэрэгсэл, кемп системийг бэлтгэнэ.
You travel as a small private team, supported by the Minuru crew.
Та Minuru багийн дэмжлэгтэйгээр жижиг хувийн багаар аялна.

div.p: Our team responds within 24–48 hours. All expeditions are fully private and custom-built.

textarea.name: description
textarea.placeholder: Tell us about your group size, preferred dates, route of interest, and any questions…

div.p: All expeditions are fully private and custom-built. We work with teams of 2–4 people. Group enquiries welcome.

p.span:
Per team of 2–3 people · 10 days
100% upfront · 100% deposit returned after expedition

2–3 хүний баг · 10 хоног
100% урьдчилгаа · 100% барьцаа буцаана
Some routes only accessible in specific months. Contact us for availability.
Зарим маршрут тодорхой саруудад л нэвтрэх боломжтой.
Fill in the details below. Our team responds within 24–48 hours.
Thank you. Our team will contact you within 24–48 hours.
Баярлалаа. Манай баг 24–48 цагийн дотор холбогдоно.

label.span: Өмнө нь off-road аялал хийж байсан уу?
What do you hope to experience?
Та энэ аяллаас юу хүлээж байна вэ?
I understand the nature of expedition travel and accept the associated risks and conditions.
Би аяллын нөхцөл, эрсдэлийг ойлгож байна.
